blocks.text: That works. The first {{fact:f:E-2017-001.client}} messaging draft is done, and I will have it to Mary Frank first thing tomorrow, following the frame Daniel Valenzuela laid out below.

One thing I want to settle before it goes out: I have left the investor-relations line as a placeholder, since I am not sure it belongs in this round or the next. Happy to walk through it on a quick call if that is faster than marking it up.
